THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DUMBHALIA, K. M. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HOGAN, ERIC TORRES, CARLOS THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 770 O'FARRELL ST., #19, S.F., CA., STAYED UNTIL JAN-10-2006, LEASE FORFEITED, JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO STIPULATION. PLAINTIFF WILL HAVE JUDGMENT FOR IMMEDIATE POSSESSION OF PREMISES LOCATED AT 770 O'FARRELL ST., #19, S.F., CA. SEE SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR ADDITIONAL CONDITIONS.
